blocker: Live GRPO run not executed: HUD/Tinker backend needs a forked Qwen slug + HUD_API_KEY + .venv-hud (3.12) and exceeds the ~15min compute cap; no fabricated curves. Wire-in also needs hud_env_v2.py to surface the parsed plan+scenario id per rollout.
